function.name: normalize_drug
function.description: Resolve a drug name (brand name, generic, or common misspelling) to its canonical generic name, RxCUI, and category (OTC / Rx / Controlled / Supplement).

name.description: The drug name to normalize (brand, generic, or misspelled).

function.name: decompose_product
function.description: Break a combination product (e.g. NyQuil, Excedrin) into its individual active ingredients with RxCUI identifiers.

product_name.description: The name of the combination product to decompose.

function.name: get_drug_info
function.description: Retrieve the full drug record (name, class, category, warnings) for a given RxCUI identifier.

rxcui.description: The RxNorm Concept Unique Identifier for the drug.

function.name: check_warnings
function.description: Analyse a list of drugs for drug-drug interactions, drug-condition contraindications, and special population risks (elderly, pregnancy, pediatric). Returns severity-graded flags and whether the case should be deferred to a healthcare professional.

drug_list.description: List of drug names (generic or brand) to check.

age.description: Patient age in years. Used for elderly (>=65) and pediatric (<12) checks.

function.name: lookup_term
function.description: Look up a medical term or abbreviation and return a plain-language definition with citation.

term.description: The medical term or abbreviation to define.

function.name: get_guideline
function.description: Retrieve USPSTF preventive-care recommendations (grade A and B) that apply to a patient based on age, sex, and conditions.

conditions.description: Optional list of patient conditions for condition-specific screening recommendations.
